jobs.title: Engineering Director - AI Platform (ANZ Remote)
jobs.salary: Not listed. Canva SEM C2 A$311-351K avg (Levels.fyi); Director level estimated A$400-600K+ total comp
jobs.summary: Define and deliver long-term AI platform strategy for Canva. Transform how AI is developed, evaluated, and deployed at global scale. Partner with leaders across Engineering, Product, Data. Coach and develop team of engineering leads and senior engineers. Ensure AI Platform is reliable, secure, performant. AI Platform Group is key part of Canva's Generative AI Supergroup — massively scalable model serving infrastructure, next-gen training and evaluation platforms.
jobs.verified: OPEN — verified via Canva careers, Lever, and multiple aggregators
